newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. FY2026 guidance (revenue +19%, OP +35%, backlog +40% on data-center/QA demand) was disclosed in the April/May FY2025 results; the next earnings report is July 23, 2026.

verdicts.rankRationale: Test & measurement lens: no new evidence since June 9; strong FY2026 guidance and +40% backlog were already in the prior case. +4.7% move is flow into the July 23 print. Design-validation bottleneck intact but +96% YTD limits residual alpha; hold.
verdicts.bull: Data-center/800G and QA orders drive +19% revenue guide; backlog +40% supports H1.
verdicts.neutral: Scarce test/validation exposure, but rerating has narrowed the discount.
verdicts.bear: Small-cap (~$3.4B), lumpy T&M orders; rich after +96% YTD.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: July 23 earnings; data-center T&M order momentum
verdicts.primaryRisk: Order lumpiness / T&M pricing and execution
